basic_info.name: Lin Haoran
basic_info.education: Bachelor's Degree (Zhejiang University, Computer Science and Technology)

fitness_background.level: 3 years of systematic training; Full Marathon PB 3:45; Intermediate fitness enthusiast
fitness_background.gym: 'Supermonkey' or 'Lefits' located 500 meters below the office (frequently visits the Wensan Road branch)
fitness_background.fitness_history: Started fitness during sophomore year due to failing physical tests and being underweight; began systematic combined strength and endurance training after starting work (3 years ago)
goals: Break the 1:40 barrier for the half marathon
Achieve a squat of 1.5x body weight
Increase muscle definition while maintaining low body fat

family_relations.name: Lin Jianguo
family_relations.connection: Holds traditional views that exercise harms the knees and often advises his son to run less. However, after seeing his son's marathon medals, his attitude has shifted to pride, and he occasionally asks if nutritional supplements are safe.

family_relations.name: Zhang Hui
family_relations.connection: Handles logistical support; specifically prepares high-protein dishes (such as braised beef and steamed fish) whenever he returns home, serving as the primary source of Haoran's healthy diet within the family.

social_circle.name: Chen Yu
social_circle.role: Frontend colleague at the same company / Running partner
social_circle.connection: Meets every Tuesday and Thursday at 6:30 AM at the Binjiang track near the office for 10km LSD (Long Slow Distance) runs, mutually monitoring pace.

social_circle.name: Wang Qiang
social_circle.role: Personal trainer met at the gym / Friend
social_circle.connection: Although no longer purchasing sessions, the two frequently exchange training plans and technical details. Wang Qiang provides spotting support when Haoran attempts heavy lifts.

daily_habits.weekday_morning: Wakes up at 06:30, drinks a cup of black coffee on an empty stomach, and performs 30 minutes of cardio or core activation depending on the day's training plan.
daily_habits.weekday_evening: Goes to the gym after work at 19:30 for 60-90 minutes of strength training (Push/Pull/Legs split), followed by protein powder supplementation.
daily_habits.weekend: Saturday morning is dedicated to long-distance endurance training (running or cycling); Sunday afternoon is for active recovery (yoga or foam rolling).
daily_habits.sleep_routine: Strictly ensures bedtime before 23:00 to guarantee 7.5 hours of sleep for optimal muscle recovery.

emotional_mapping.trigger: High pressure before project launches and anxiety caused by code bugs
emotional_mapping.coping_behavior: Puts on noise-canceling headphones for high-intensity interval running (HIIT), using extreme physical exhaustion to clear the mind and achieve calmness.

emotional_mapping.trigger: Achieving a Personal Record (PR) or completing a long-distance training session
emotional_mapping.emotion: Sense of accomplishment, sense of control
emotional_mapping.coping_behavior: Posts data updates on WeChat Moments or sports app communities to gain social validation and reinforce self-efficacy.

life_milestones.impact: Shifted from exercising solely for weight loss to enjoying the challenges of endurance sports, establishing a 'runner' identity.

life_milestones.event: Suffered from Iliotibial Band Syndrome (ITBS) in the right knee, resulting in a two-month training hiatus
life_milestones.impact: Gained a profound understanding of the importance of recovery and scientific training; began systematically studying sports anatomy and stopped blindly lifting heavy weights.

equipment.gear: Compression calf sleeves, Bone conduction headphones (Shokz OpenRun)

nutrition.staples: Brown rice, sweet potatoes, chicken breast, beef, deep-sea fish
nutrition.supplements: Whey protein powder (ON brand), Creatine, Multivitamins, Electrolyte effervescent tablets
nutrition.dietary_habit: Brings homemade bento boxes on weekdays with strict control over oil and salt; cheat meals are scheduled for Saturday evenings.

recovery: Uses foam rollers and massage guns to relax the outer thighs and calves
One sports massage session per week

apps: Strava (Running/Cycling data logging and social networking)
tracking.method: Habituallly uses Excel to record weekly strength training weights and sets to analyze progressive overload curves.
